name: Shobu
author: Manny Vega & Jamie Sajdak (2019, Smirk & Dagger) / AGP port
description: Shobu (Manny Vega & Jamie Sajdak, 2019) — an acclaimed modern abstract played across four 4x4 boards (two dark, two light) in a 2x2 layout. Each turn a player makes a PASSIVE move on one of their two home boards (1 or 2 squares, 8 directions, no pushing) then a matching AGGRESSIVE move — the SAME direction and distance on a board of the OPPOSITE colour, which may shove a single opponent stone (and push it off the board to remove it). Win the instant your opponent has no stones left on any one of the four boards.
